description.task: Implement a GraphDFS class that performs depth-first search on an undirected graph (adjacency list). Return the visited order, detect if a path exists between two nodes, and find all nodes reachable from a source.
instructions: hasPath: run DFS from src; return whether dst appears in the visited set
reachable: run DFS from src; return visited set minus the src node itself
dfs and dfsHelper are already implemented — use them as helpers or model
description.hint: hasPath: Set<Integer> visited=new HashSet<>(); dfsHelper(graph,src,visited,new ArrayList<>()); return visited.contains(dst); reachable: same, then visited.remove(src); return visited;
description.expectedOutput:
DFS from 0: [0, 1, 3, 4, 2]
hasPath(0,4): true
hasPath(2,3): true
Reachable from 0: [1, 2, 3, 4]

description.task: Implement a GraphBFS class that uses BFS to find the shortest path (by hop count) between two nodes in an unweighted graph, and to find the minimum number of hops from source to all reachable nodes.
instructions: shortestPath: after BFS fills parent map, reconstruct by traversing from dst to src using parent; reverse the path and return
bfsDistances: standard BFS; for each dequeued node, set dist[neighbor]=dist[curr]+1 for unseen neighbors; return dist map
If dst not reachable, return empty list
Shortest path from 1 to 6: 1→3→4→6 (3 edges) or 1→2→4→6
description.hint: Reconstruct: List<Integer> path=new ArrayList<>(); int curr=dst; while(curr!=-1){path.add(0,curr); curr=parent.get(curr);} return path; bfsDistances: Map<Integer,Integer> dist=new HashMap<>(); dist.put(src,0); BFS adding dist[nb]=dist[curr]+1;

description.task: Implement a CycleDetector class that uses DFS to detect if an undirected graph contains a cycle. For each node, track the parent to avoid false positives from the same edge traversal.
instructions: In the else if (neighbor != parent) branch: return true; (a back edge to a non-parent visited node means a cycle)
The parent parameter prevents the algorithm from treating the undirected edge as a back edge
hasCycle and the dfs skeleton are already provided
Just add 'return true;' inside the empty else-if block
